## What changed?

Describe the change in plain language.

## Why?

Explain the user, contributor, or safety problem this solves.

## Contributor lane

- [ ] Source Fox
- [ ] Glossary Fox
- [ ] Model Fox
- [ ] UI Fox
- [ ] Test Fox
- [ ] Research Fox
- [ ] Safety Fox

## Safety checklist

- [ ] I did not include secrets, tokens, private keys, seed phrases, or private logs.
- [ ] I did not add a required paid API dependency.
- [ ] I kept CoinFox educational and readout-focused.
- [ ] I avoided wording that sounds like live account control.
- [ ] I ran relevant tests or explained why I could not.

## Bias impact

If this affects `LONG` / `SHORT` / `NEUTRAL`, confidence, thesis checks, source
health, or replay gates, explain what changed and why.

## Source/model promotion

- [ ] New sources start experimental.
- [ ] Source/model changes include tests or fixtures.
- [ ] Replay comparison is included when the public bias can change.
- [ ] Plain-English docs or glossary entries were updated.

## Screenshots or output

Paste a small sample if this changes CLI, API, or mobile UI behavior.
